title: seriphidium oranense
intro: Seriphidium oranense, also known as Oran Atlas Cedar or Moroccan Atlas Cedar, is a shrub that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial abilities, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Seriphidium oranense include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
